title: Effect of screening mammography on the risk of breast cancer deaths and of all-cause deaths: a systematic review with meta-analysis of cohort studies
source: Autier et al., Journal of Clinical Epidemiology, 2024

L2: Systematic review evaluates the effectiveness of screening mammography on breast cancer and all-cause mortality
Meta-analysis of cohort studies provides evidence on mammography screening impact
L3: Systematic review and meta-analysis of observational cohort studies evaluating the effect of screening mammography programs on the risk of breast cancer deaths and all-cause deaths in women offered screening, providing population-level evidence for screening effectiveness
